sglang.author: thelongestusernameofall
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

This PR mitigates CVE-2025-10164, a critical remote code execution (RCE) vulnerability caused by unsafe pickle deserialization in MultiprocessingSerializer. By restricting dynamic class loading during unpickling, we proactively block potential exploitation attempts.

This PR removes an excessive lines in logging of the xgrammar backend.
Signed-off-by: Aaron Pham contact@aarnphm.xyz

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix Pydantic union resolution for ResponseFunctionToolCall in Responses API
vllm.author: strinczer
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR addresses all the comments from #24158. See that PR for the full problem description.

vllm.title: [Misc] Avoid "PyTorch non-writable tensors" warning in RayPPCommunicator
vllm.author: ruisearch42
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
PyTorch warns when a non-writable buffer is used to create a tensor:

vllm.title: [Docs] remove v1 column for embedding models
vllm.author: piood
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Remove the V1 column from the multimodal embedding models table to maintain consistency with the rest of the documentation.
This PR fixes an inconsistency introduced in #27324, which added a V1 column to the multimodal embedding models table. However, the V1 column had been previously remove
